name: generate-api-docs
system_prompt: You are a helpful coding assistant. Write clear, accurate documentation.
turns: Now write a module-level docstring and a usage example that shows rate limiting HTTP requests to 10 per second with burst up to 20.
Add type hints to all methods. Show the complete class with both docstrings and type hints.
Write a README section for this class: overview, quick start, configuration, and common pitfalls (like what happens if rate=0 or capacity=0).
Review the documentation you wrote. Is anything inaccurate? Does wait_and_consume actually have a subtle bug with the sleep duration?
outcome_description: Response generates accurate docstrings with Args/Returns sections and adds type hints
